top3.sql:
SELECT 
    s_store_name,
    i_category,
    SUM(ss_ext_sales_price) AS total_profit
FROM 
    store_sales
    JOIN store ON ss_store_sk = s_store_sk
    JOIN item ON ss_item_sk = i_item_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
WHERE 
    d_quarter_name = '1998Q4'
GROUP BY 
    s_store_name,
    i_category
ORDER BY 
    s_store_name,
    i_category
LIMIT 100

SELECT 
    s_store_name,
    i_category,
    SUM(ss_ext_sales_price) AS total_profit
FROM 
    store_sales
    JOIN store ON ss_store_sk = s_store_sk
    JOIN item ON ss_item_sk = i_item_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
WHERE 
    d_quarter_name = '1998Q4'
GROUP BY 
    s_store_name,
    i_category
ORDER BY 
    s_store_name,
    i_category
LIMIT 100

SELECT 
    s_store_name,
    i_category,
    SUM(ss_ext_sales_price - ss_ext_wholesale_cost) AS total_profit
FROM 
    store_sales
    JOIN store ON ss_store_sk = s_store_sk
    JOIN item ON ss_item_sk = i_item_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
WHERE 
    d_year = 1998 AND d_moy = 11
GROUP BY 
    s_store_name,
    i_category
ORDER BY 
    s_store_name,
    i_category
LIMIT 100
